title: Create a dedicated review page for apps with an actual link
excerpt:
Hello! 
As a developer it would be great to have an dedicated page with a link for users leave reviews for the apps we create. By having a proper CTA link for leaving a review we could have much higher engagement for use…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

As a developer it would be great to have an dedicated page with a link for users leave reviews for the apps we create. By having a proper CTA link for leaving a review we could have much higher engagement for users leaving reviews. At the moment it is not very intuitive on how to leave a review and it is also hard to ask users to leave reviews through emailing or posts without a direct CTA link to connect to a review page. Thank you!
